memory:memory/2026-04-08.md:1:10.snippet: # 2026-04-08 - User wants Jarvis to be able to run a business autonomously, with only approval for external actions. - User learned the startup flow: open OpenClaw, start the OpenClaw browser, keep Gmail/Stripe/GitHub/Telegram approvals signed in, and avoid switching profiles or clearing cookies. - For GitHub token use, repo-only permissions were recommended for pushing the site; workflow permissions are unnecessary for the current website push. - GitHub Pages settings kept redirecting to Enterprise signup / unauthenticated state, indicating the repo Pages path is the actual blocker, not the local files. - Ollama was installed successfully on the Mac and Gemma is available locally. - Routin
